Como persona que ha alcanzado el rango Elite en las dos últimas temporadas en solitario debo no recomendar este juego si te interesa la parte competitiva en solitario.

El juego se siente bastante mejor a las betas y la primera temporada, los cosméticos están bien y los juegos temporales que añaden (sobre todo el 1vs1) son muy disfrutables.

Sin embargo, el sistema de rankeds muestra bastantes asperezas. No parece equilibrar bien los equipos, que supone que te encontrarás muchas más veces de las que esperarías con un equipo con compañeros muy débiles y tú teniendo que cargar con gran pase del peso del equipo, al menos si juegas sólo en competitivo. Además, no parece haber un castigo contra conductas como egoísmo extremo o autogoles por frustración.

Igualmente, su pase de batalla es bastante extenso. Pases de batalla en otros juegos (como Tekken 8, para poner un ejemplo) requieren de menor dependencia para poder ser completado sin notar que estás trabajando por el pase y no recompensarte por jugar de forma orgánica.

Sin embargo, si vas a jugar con amigos o el pase no te genera mucha fricción, sí lo recomendaría. Pero, si ese es un requisito indispensable para poder disfrutar del juego al completo, no puedo recomendarlo.

The game is fun but riddled with bugs. Netcode is super super inconsistent. The truth is, even with perfect netcode, I'm not even sure the game would be consistent. The mixed of "free ball physics" and "locked ball on player" makes it super frustrating and inconsistent. Add the server lags, and you get a super inconsistent game. Add the bugs and you get a frustrating experience.

Lack of control remaps. The fact that pressing B while sprinting makes it a sliding tackle. The "close" situations where you just have to pray you will get locked on the ball first. The weird goalkeeper dives, or not getting locked on a cross as a goal keeper. Getting locked out in an animation after being hit by a sliding tackle, even though the same player went past you as he missed his previous sliding tackle, but got up so fast that he can already tackle you once more. I could go on forever on all the tiny details that adds up and makes the experience so frustrating.

Let's not forget the number of crashes to desktop. At least 5 or 6 in 10 hours of playtime. 

The game is in a very messy state and it feels like it would have needed way more time before release. It's a shame because the game is really something special and addicting, but it needs way way more polishing before I could recommend this game.

Really loving this game. I'm not a big football guy but I've dipped into the FIFA games over the years, and it's nice to have a simple arcade-y football experience like this. 

There's so much polish and flair that makes simple passes and volleys feel great and really enhances the experience.
It's absolutely great to play with friends too, solo queuing is meh, but at least the games don't last too long so it's not too bad of a painful experience.

There's definitely plenty for Sloclap to work on though:
- Possession feels really inconsistent, there's nothing to clearly indicate if you have the ball, i.e. if I run in X direction, will the ball come with me? Sometimes I'll change direction or decide to dribble mid-sprint and I'll just run away from the ball because I thought I was still in possession.
- The strength of certain passes can't really be adjusted, you either pelt it or not at all. There's not much middle ground. And it's really hard to aim passes, since there's no indicator showing which way you're aiming so you kinda just guess based on which way the analog stick is pointing. A little circle with an arrow at the players' feet would be super helpful. Maybe the indicator showing where the ball will land should show and move depending on the strength of a volley as it increases, because right now it's just guess work and it ends up going nowhere near where I wanted it to. It's hard to be precise in this game because of this.
- Speaking of the ball indicator, it needs to be MUCH clearer. It's a translucent light-blue arrow on a green floor. It needs way more contrast to make it easier to spot. 
- The networking is still a bit wonky. I've seen keepers roll the ball directly into their own goal. I've seen the ball be automatically given to the team that scored instead of to the centre to the team that conceded it. I really hope it's just ping between players, but sometimes certain interactions just get completely ignored due to the networking. Tackles that absolutely should've connected or just running straight over the ball without possessing it. 
- When all players are in their own box and the assigned keeper exits the box, the keeper is automatically assigned to a random player. In a tense situation this gets REALLY confusing given that the keeper has a different control set and can pick up the ball. It would be nice to be able to choose one person to always spawn in goal (especially in a squad) and have priority for being the keeper in a situation where everyone is in the box.
- The keeper can dive or slide for a ball, but often I've found that I let a ball in because it was too low for a dive, but too high for a slide, there's no middle option for when you need to move similar to a dive/slide but not too high or low. 

I'd like to think after crossplay they'll start working on the above, although some of these should've been ironed out in the betas but oh well. 

Aside from those few things, it's a really fun game and even more so with friends in a squad. If you're soloq-ing just be prepared for keepers that will come out of goal and leave it wide open, sweats who think they can dribble in a 1v3 and refuse to pass even though you're in the box with enough free space to do the Caspa Slide, your entire squad sprinting for the ball all at once (and generally lacking a sense of strategy and positioning), and the rare but classic mug tackling their own teammate to steal the ball from them. 

Looking forward to seeing where this goes, Sloclap did some great things with Sifu after release and I hope they give Rematch the same treatment!

Nehratelný odpad, Evropské servery plné lagujících Rusáků a Asiatů (portují se o dva metry jinam i s balónem). Kolikrát šílená latence serveru a latence vstupů, když soupeř začne animaci tak už s tím nic neuděláte, mě seberou balón i jako brankáři což by nemělo jít.

Nato že to je pouze rovná plocha s max deseti hráči, tak komp topí jak kdyby těžil bitcoiny. Kdyby to šlo tak ji refundnu.

Update:
Konečně vypnuli částečně těžbu kripta, ale stále to je sračka nejvyššího kalibru. Jak nehrajete na ovladači, tak v té hře neuděláte nic, ovládání pro klávesnici dělal nějaký ♥♥♥♥♥♥. Prostě další debilita co nadržuje těm co hrají na ovladači, jak jim začne animace tak s tím neuděláte nic a oni vám seberou všechno jakoukoli akcí (dost často i tím že nedělají nic). Dost často prohrajete tím, že se někdo odpojí (dotyčný není penalizován), nebo že se nedá locknout balón, běháte skrz něj a nic. Programátoři by se měli jít doučit fyziku, anatomii a programování.

Vřele tuto hru nedoporučuji (masochisty to asi bude bavit), je to špatně naprogramovaný odpad.

Update 2:
Po nějaké době jsem to zapnul a doufal že to vylepšili, ale opak je pravdou. Bohužel je to ještě větší odpad než když to vyšlo. Lagující a portující se soupeři v každé hře, replay ukáže něco jiného než jste viděli během hry. Opět asi zapnuli těžbu krypta a aby to nebylo poznat tak rozmazali pro jistotu obraz. A k tomu ke všemu tam je teď spousta toxických hráčů, kteří nic během hry nepředvedou a jen spamují emote chat.

Update 3:
Je to ještě horší a tak pěkná hra to mohla být, regiony jsou totálně k ničemu, jak tam má někdo ping nad 100 tak se portuje a klidně i o dva metry. Všechno je zabugovaný a vývojáři se starají jen o prachy ze skinů :( Neopravili míření a jen přidali dva další nefunkční nesmyslné módy.

[h1] Çobanların İcabına Bakmak Lazım [/h1]
Ben sosyete ve beyaz atlı prens değilim ama bazı sesini soluğunu bilmem ne yaptığım kenar mahalle çocukları var ağzından bok damlayan bir onlar için report sistemi gelmeli. Birde oynayışını, oyun zekasını bilmem ne yaptıklarım içinde report sistemi gelmeli. Hatta ne report sistemi, direkt oyundan atma gelsin. Zaten oyunun ortasına girebilme sistemi de var. Sonra "Bravo! Bu İş Bizde!, Teşekkürler! Üzgünüm!" gibi iletişim baloncukları daha fazla eklenmeli ve tabii değiştirmesi de eklensin.
[h1] Nedir Rekabetçi Oyunlardan Çektiğimiz [/h1]
Bu zamana kadar neredeyse piyasadaki her baba yiğit rekabetçi oyunu oynamışımdır. Birde yeni çıkanlarının pek çoğununda da mekanikleri basit oluyor. Basit derken sadece kolaylık açısından da değil, derinliği de yok. Mesela sprey pattern olmaması veya çok sıradan movement hareketlerinin olması en önemli etken fikrimce. Hani silah dümdüz ateşliyor mermiyi takip etmene bile gerek yok sadece ortadaki crosshair takip etsen okey. Sonra hikayeli oyun gibi movement mekanikleri var falan.
[h1] Oyuna Gelirsem [/h1]
   Rematch, olayı çözmüş gibi. En başta, herifler futbolu daha oyunlaştırmış ve bununla da birlikte beklenilen ve sıradan mekanikler yerine; öğrenmesi birazcık kolay ama ustalaşması ayrı zor mekanikler karşılıyor. Bu iş burada bitti mesela. Şans yok, saçma sapan rastgele özellikler yok, sadece rush yok, karakter dengelemeleri absürt değil, ciddi ciddi strateji yapabiliyorsun ve böylelikle de E-spor'u direkt eklenebilir bir oyun haline geliyor. 

   Bazılarımız Fifa veya Pes haricinde bu konsepte yani TPS/üçüncü şahıs bir futbol oyunu belki de daha önceden oynamıştır. Gülmeyin ama Roblox'ta aynı bu şekil oyun vardı :D Tabii hatalı mı hatalı, hiperaktif ergenlerle dolup taşan bir oyundu. Ama tabii bu konseptin daha iyi versiyonunu Rematch olmuş oldu. Alın oynayın, oynattırın.

[h1] Rematch – Fußball neu gedacht [/h1]

[h2] Ein Spiel wie kein anderes [/h2]
Mit Rematch wagt sich das französische Studio Sloclap an ein ungewöhnliches Genre: ein Fußballspiel – aber eben keines, wie man es kennt. Statt klassischem Top-Down-Gameplay übernimmt man aus der Third-Person-Perspektive einen einzelnen Spieler. Das macht jede Aktion direkter, körperlicher und intensiver. Taktik, Timing und Technik stehen im Fokus.

[h2] Gameplay: Einfach, aber fordernd [/h2]

Die Steuerung ist bewusst reduziert gehalten, doch das bedeutet nicht, dass das Spiel leicht wäre. Im Gegenteil: Rematch verlangt präzises Positionieren, cleveres Teamspiel und gutes Ballgefühl. Dank gut gemachter Tutorials und Trainingsmöglichkeiten gelingt der Einstieg dennoch angenehm schnell. Matches sind kurz, schnell und emotional – ideal für spontane Sessions.

[h2] Stil & Atmosphäre [/h2]

Optisch überzeugt Rematch mit einem stylischen Sci-Fi-Look. Die Arenen erinnern an futuristische Stadien, die Charaktere sind individuell gestaltbar und animiert. Auch akustisch stimmt das Gesamtbild – von der Soundkulisse bis zu den Emotes zur Kommunikation im Spiel.

[h2] Technische Schwächen [/h2]

Trotz des starken Gameplays trüben einige Punkte den Gesamteindruck. Es fehlt an lokalen Multiplayer-Modi, Crossplay ist zum Start nicht verfügbar, und kleinere Bugs sowie Serverprobleme kommen immer wieder vor. Auch das Menüdesign wirkt teils unfertig, wichtige Infos bleiben unklar.

[h2] Fazit [/h2]

Rematch ist eine mutige und erfrischende Neuinterpretation des Fußballs – mit Elementen aus Action, Taktik und Teamplay. Zwar fehlt es noch an Feinschliff und Komfortfunktionen, doch das Herzstück, das Gameplay, ist stark und macht schnell süchtig.

[b] 8 von 10 Punkten [/b]
Ein innovatives Sportspiel, das begeistert – mit Luft nach oben beim technischen Feinschliff.

The controls are really bad. Especially on m/kb.
The game plays completely differently on m/kb. 

In this game when you're on controller the direction of the shot is based on the camera, the spin of the ball is based on your left analog stick, and you can slightly adjust your shot while charging it with the right analog stick. You can control the direction of a pass or lob with the left analog stick.

However on m/kb the spin of the ball is based on your movement with the mouse and you cannot adjust your shot while charging it because the mouse input is being used for the spin of the ball, The direction of a lob or pass is also based on the direction of the mouse so blade shots going to the left or right are borderline impossible to get consistently.

Best football Game rn. IF you play in Europe you won’t get any server problems like others do, mainly USA has problems but recently they were fixed. Game requires teamplay in order to win so egoists go back to rocket league chasing balls like you always do.

Rematch lets you experience an incredible football game outside of the vile ironclad clutches of EA sports from the unique prespective of being a single player on the field, Interesting enough there hasn't been any claims for the game being "woke" due to the fact that in most matches men, women, trans and even disabled people all play together and share the same field and compete with each other. Oh trust me, it doesn't bother me but anyone who plays at least 3 games cannot ignore the overwhelming variety of human beings here than any other soccer title that's ever existed, I reckon.

Whats the game about? Well, there's not really much story here, I guess if we go via the prologue you're basically someone who is playing football on the street and then decides to join a team but you're too selfish and learn to be a team player and then you get picked to play and boom, now you're playing. Thats it. 

This title prides itself on the need for team work, and there's 3 versions of soccer to try out, 3v3, 4v4 and 5v5.  Everyone will have their own personal preference, but 5v5 is the best experience by far and of course, its the only mode that has a ranked system. Controls might be a bit tricky of some and while there's a request for a "on ball" cam like rocket league, I can understand why it shouldn't be considered since it helps replicate the experience of playing the game in real life.  Good teams can get really creative here, and there's some basic comms depending which part of the field you're on but the best time this game gives is when everyone is on the microphone, calling spots and directing traffic to ensure you get the best goals together. 

The game obviously is soley PvP only and there is no bots or single player mode where you can face AI teams. So best of luck to the devs to ensure they can maintain a healthy player base for years to come because to be fair, the game play is excellent and easy to get started. For those who want to know if there's something more than gameplay, you'd be happy to know that there's a good selection of stuff to earn and unlock. When playing the beta I was expecting this game to potentially become a new e-sport, and maybe one day it'll be free to play with money only being on tri-monthly passes with a wide variety of cool cosmetics.   The game has great potential for cross overs, brands and areas too so it has a great foundation to go far but like most new indie games that have an ambitious pvp experience, its all about keeping your core community of players satisfied and happy. 

Honestly, I thought this game would have swept up the momentum on the world cup happening next year, but who knows. 
and hopefully it stays away from something like epic. Still can't forgive them for the dirty stuff they do with rocket league.  

Anyway, getcha boys and off ya go.

[h1]《Rematch》：你告诉我，《Sifu》团队做出了最纯粹的足球？[/h1]
　　《Rematch》这部作品在上线前无疑受到了不小关注，当然质疑的声音也有不少——而说来说去，无非就是制作团队是曾经制作过大热好评动作游戏《Sifu》的Sloclap而已。虽然因为从动作游戏到足球游戏的跨度会让人捏一把汗，并且足球游戏本身就是个高技术壁垒的领域，但玩家们同样期望看到类似“功夫足球”的上演，给沉闷的体育游戏市场带来点变数。
[h1][quote=]
[table]
[tr]
[th] 欢迎关注 [b][u][i]U_U鉴赏家培养计划[/i][/u][/b][/th]
[/tr]
[tr]
[th] 关注U_U鉴赏家，开启精彩游戏之旅。 [/th]
[/tr]
[/table]
[/quote][/h1]

　　从结果来看，玩家的担忧与期待似乎都要落空了——一方面是本作展现出了优秀的动作基础，横亘在它们眼前的高墙就像当年制作《Sifu》一样被轻松打破；另一方面是《Rematch》并没有如预期般带来“功夫足球”的酣畅体验，正相反，这次Sloclap的足球是非常纯粹的，因为能决定胜利的只有玩家的操作技术而已。

[h2]回归单人视角，小场下的无规则足球[/h2]
　　除了美术方面能看到许多《Sifu》的影子（这种低模多边形也非常有韵味了），《Rematch》在操作逻辑以及规则之上相较于传统足球游戏都有较大变革。首先是作品摈除了惯用的「一人操纵一队」的基础玩法，而是让玩家专注于某个角色，并且这与足球游戏里的合作模式仍有不同，因为视角已经从俯瞰变成了第三人称！如果要举例的话，类似《街头篮球》之类的游戏或许更加接近，只是在视角方面做得更加深入而已。

　　另一方面，游戏采用了小场规则，人数上限被划分在5人制足球的框架内，可以满足从3V3到5V5的匹配机制——这点对经常踢球的球友来说比较友好，但对那些只看比赛不踢球（比如俺）的云球迷来说就有些陌生了。

　　尽管咱们这一次看不见期待的“功夫足球”，不过《Rematch》还是玩了点花样：球场是没有边界的！或者说，用一堵「无形之墙」替代了边界。存在这样一个反物理规则本身就非同寻常，所以玩家们也利用它开发出了许多战术，比如经典的“射门假动作”，对着守门员身后的墙壁先来个一两脚，骗出其扑救动作后再进行补射——这可是比假射还假射！

[h2]传停带射样样精？先从瞄准练起！[/h2]
　　既然给到了玩家独自操纵的第三人称角色，《Rematch》也没有浪费角色性能，给到了相当高的操作上限，也许不能尝试“功夫足球”，但是玩出许多花式操作还是没问题的——不过问题也在这里，操作自由度给的太高了！甚至非常反传统的将射门自动化取消掉，而是让玩家手动瞄准，这其实有点违反常规操作逻辑，毕竟手柄的线性输入与瞄准本身就不太搭边，FPS也一直是手柄的弱项，所以《Rematch》这种接近FPS的射门体验其实用手柄玩需要勤学苦练提高准头，而用键鼠确实能提高射门精度、但在其他操作舒适度上又比不过手柄，总之让我觉得稍微有点别扭。

　　但总的来说，这个将射门交给玩家自己操作的设计还是相当大胆的，它勇敢走出了以往足球游戏的舒适区，不过换句话来说，也可能会给老玩家们带来反直觉的不适感。

[h2]最纯粹的技术比拼，这就是足球！[/h2]
　　另一个让人喜忧参半的是，那些专注独自操控单一球员的体育游戏通常都会有「角色」模块，也是游戏的重要氪金点之一；而《Rematch》作为一款长线运营游戏，则完全没有角色概念，所有球员都只有外观上的差异、毫无性能强弱！

　　对于习惯了买断制单机的玩家来说，这个做法的确是相当友好的；不过坏处则是，一方面是让自己长线运营的竞争力减弱，另一方面则让游戏聚焦于纯粹的「技术」上，回归了最原始的足球。想要变得更强？唯有永恒的四个大字：菜就多练！

[h2]总结[/h2]
　　总之，《Rematch》整体上是一款对得起玩家期待的游戏，Sloclap并没有初次制作足球游戏的稚嫩感，相反，它们跟当初制作《Sifu》的时候一样，再次用自己的满腔热忱还原了对足球这个主题的理解，为玩家带来一出别开生面的足球盛宴。或许细节还有瑕疵，不过这份热情跟诚意，却实打实地照进了玩家的心中。

Absolutely love the game, its only been out for few days and i have already put 44 hrs into it and another 13 hrs in the beta and i have grinded ranked to elite 2300 RP. There are a few bugs that still need improvement like the crashing of the game after someone scores or someone getting a save as a GK, and a bug where your player freezes and cant move when you load into a game, an obvious bug that needs to be fixed is when  someone crashes in a ranked game with 15 secs left they lose the rp even if they won because it counts them as someone who left the game, and some latency issues but the devs are putting out updates daily and handling most of those concerns. A few things i would like for them to add are probably letting players do free play together while in a party waiting on matchmaking, letting players see the ranks of others after the match or when  they are in a party, fixing the ranked system by adding relegation games when you are about to lose a rank instead of letting someone sit in gold div 3 0 rp even though they have lost 8 games in a row, and a half court 1v1 game mode would be cool. Also they need to make sure steam is tracking achievements correctly as there are multiple achievement i have completed but not gotten and i have heard the same from multiple people in the community as well.

Un super jeu de foot fun !

Joueur de Rivals, je trouve ce jeu encore plus fun et accessible. J’ai vraiment hâte de voir comment il va évoluer avec les prochaines mises à jour.

Points faibles actuels :

Il y a encore quelques crashs de temps en temps.

Le jeu fait chauffer pas mal mon PC, donc un peu plus d’optimisation serait bienvenu.

J’espère qu’on aura plus de skins à l’avenir.

Il manque aussi la possibilité de jouer contre l’IA, ce serait top pour s’entraîner ou jouer quand il n’y a pas beaucoup de monde en ligne.

Ce que j’aimerais voir dans le futur :

Une meilleure boutique avec plus de choix.

Des skins pour les joueurs et gardiens de foot.

Des skins qui n’ont rien à voir avec le foot, pour encore plus de fun !

Le cross-play pour avoir encore plus de joueurs en ligne (j’ai lu que c’est prévu, donc vivement !).

Plus de cosmétiques en général dans la boutique.


Un mode où on peut choisir des rôles comme gardien, défenseur, attaquant, etc.

Malgré ces petits défauts, je conseille vraiment le jeu, il est super fun à jouer, surtout avec des amis !

Just cheap AF to do your day 1 customers dirty. With OG Rocket League there was no battle passes and you could trade your items to other players.

I have no problem paying for the game, but don’t make me feel like a chump who paid for a f2p with dumb monetization like this on day 1.

Es un juego que está en una beta sin decirlo. Como mínimo requiere de un año completo para mejorar.

[h1]Recommandation sous conditions ![/h1]

[b]Enorme potentiel ![/b] à condition que les soucis de serveurs soient fix !
Multiple bugs déjà connus !
[b]Manque d'accessibilité de manière générale par exemple:[/b]
- Pouvoir lancer une recherche de match pendant un entrainement
- Pouvoir lancer un match privé avec un lobby de plusieurs joueurs
- La possibilité de voir la progression des niveaux hors fin de match

Cependant ! Le gameplay est très très cool lorsque les bonnes conditions sont réunies càd, une connexion & des serveurs stables et un jeu stable.
Même si ces requis sont la base pour un jeu ce n'est que le début et cela peut prendre du temps à se débloquer.

Donc nous sommes toujours dans l'attente de fix majeurs de stabilité d'instance mais aussi d'amélioration d'accessibilité et de navigation dans l'interface du jeu.

O jogo em si é muito divertido e viciante! Mas ao mesmo tempo pode ser muito estressante, principalmente com certos jogadores. TÊM MUITO FDP, um bando de fominha e que se acha! Você pode facilmente se estressar por isso.

- FALTA CROSSPLAY: inadmissível não ter já no lançamento! Muita gente com gamepass e que poderia jogar com os amigos da Steam.
- DENUNCIAR OU BLOQUEAR: É só diretamente pela Steam, deveria ter no próprio jogo! Assim facilitaria para você não jogar com tal jogador. Exemplo: Poderia aparecer uma mensagem se caso tiver esse jogador no lobby. 
-  BUGS/CORREÇÕES: Conquistas estão bugadas, delay até parece que é a internet! Porém, é problema nos servidores, necessita ter cuidado para corrigir o quanto antes, para o jogo não ficar abandonado pela comunidade.

EU RECOMENDO, mas têm um porém, o jogo é recomendável jogar com amigos! Aleatório só alguns que se salvam.

Rematch è fantastico. Il dribbling è molto soddisfacente quando va a buon fine contro un difensore. Il freestyle in generale molto gradito. Giocarci da solo e con gli amici è divertente lo stesso ma non in egual misura perché in compania è sempre meglio. Sto gioco mi ha preso sin dalla beta perché ti immerge nel campo, il dribbling è super divertente, inoltre il fatto che il campo sia delimitato da muri trasparenti permette di fare tipo muro, rimpallo e rovesciata, figata assurda quando segni un gol così. Poi collaborare con quelli che giocano bene è super soddisfacente e divertente. Ti migliora il lato strategico del calcio visto che sei nella prospettiva di un solo giocatore nel campo, visione di gioco ecc. Questo gioco è bello perché puoi incoraggiare gli altri, puoi dirgli che ha fatto un ottimo lavoro, scusarti se sbagli e ringraziare per l'ottima giocata che hai fatto. A volte ci sfottiamo con ottimo lavoro quando sbagliamo e per esempio io dico grazie ehehehehe. Super consigliato. Spero che non muoia questo gioco.

I was lost. Every day-- I asked myself: what is the meaning of life? It is a roundabout manner. I wake up. I eat. I work. I sleep. I was but a cog in the machine-- the machine that leads its owners to greatness. But I? To be forgotten. The victorious write history. And I was the loser.

     So I deduced. There was no meaning to life. We are born, and we grow. Grow to be slaves to work. To be trapped within walls. I had been a bird-- trapped in a cage for all its miserable and lonely life. But then... I came across REMATCH. "I might as well give it a try, no?" I saw gameplay videos. It looked amazing. Finally, no more of the same football game re-released every year with a different number. No more opening packs and shouting "GOLD GOLD GOLD!!" Only to get some guy named Messi.

     I was enlightened. All my life, I walked the path of darkness, only for REMATCH to usurp that darkness and show me the light. The right path was finally revealed to me. And so I bought the game. I went straight into it. Goal after goal, loss after loss, win after win... No matter if I won or lost, I felt this sense of joy within me for the first time. I finally felt vindicated.

     The susurration of the darkness finally left me. It was love. Love for the game.  Every dribble, every pass, every shot, every goal. Even when I heard "CROSS IT!" "PASS" BACK POST!" a million times the moment I took possession of the ball-- I knew it was love. No matter how many teammates with stage 6 blue lock brainrot I got-- I knew it was love. No matter how many goalkeepers who dived the opposite way for a ball heading straight to them-- I knew it was love. True love-- no matter the hardships you experience with them, you still love them. 

     That was when I realized... This is true American Football.

There is some good stuff and I can see there is some stuff to like but... I just can't get over how flawed this launch has been. I have about 30 hours in the pretest which is relevant because this is essentially the same product. 

PROS
+ Passing/Shooting/Teamwork all feel great
+GK'ing is very fun and works better than I expected
+ Graphics are great
+ Easily accessible it is pretty easy for new players to jump in with what seems like a high skill ceiling 
+ Game never crashed (and I am guessing you won't crash either unless you have a potato) 
 
NEUTRAL

+/-DRIBBLING: I am not a big fan of the dribbling/rainbow kick system I do not like how winning the ball or losing the ball feels. It feels very simulated. I would rather feel like I am playing an avatar with a real ball (like rocket league or slapshot) This is not the fault of the devs I just think that is how netcode will work with this genre. Over time this will probably get better. I do see some weird netcode/lag stuff but that is to be expected when playing with 10 randos on day 1, I am assuming some people have horrible ping. Not much that can be done about that. 

NEGATIVES

-MATCHMAKING: No cross play. Matchmaking support 3 different game modes: 3v3, 4v4, 5v5 which is spacing out the player population too much which is very bad for matchmaking. Queue times of 10+ minutes which is no surprise considering the flawed options. Forcing people to play a lot of casual games before getting into ranked splits up the population even more. 

-No Push-to-talk voice com option? Everyone is on a hot mic... this is problamatic for me for so many reasons. 1) Most people have horrible mics I do not want to hear them all the time 2) Background noise 3) I twitch stream so now I have no way to talk to my chat without also talking to the people in game. To me this is the biggest indicator that this game is simply not beind developed. 

-The controls are just confusing. I basically just use shoot to pass to people at this point. Not sure why there is an alternative way to kick the ball at short distances although it does work sometimes. Some stuff works and feels good but some stuff just is confusing. Custom Controls do not help. In general the menus are confusing and can be fixed very easily by implementing the same custom controls menu every other game has. Headers feel bad, but that part might just be a skill issue. This is something that will evolve over time if the game is going to be successful but right now I think it is a mess. 

-No League/Tourney/Replay Systems/Custom Games/Squad Features. For 30$ give me something more than a ranked mode. Yes I love mmr but they are just being lazy with the lack of features.

-SERVERS: Clearly were not able to handle launch which is a huge blow to the player population. People said it felt worse than the tests and I agree. 

- Making me replay like 25 casual games to get into ranked again was traumatic for me (I hate casual games) and I will simply not be doing it while getting hot mic'd with 4 laggy strangers. 


CONCLUSION
I would be ok with this stuff if this was not a 30$ full release game. My issue is I do not think this game is being developed based on what we saw from the test till now. These were easy things to identify and fix in the early access and now they basically 'lose' their launch and will not have the player population to support the way the game is currently setup. You do not get a second launch. 

I will monitor this game and things can always turn in the right direction but I would recommend this game as a free to play game in its current state not a 30$ product.

It is a fast paced, fun game of arcade soccer. It is easy enough to learn, but rewarding to master, and when you score a master-piece of a goal it is an amazing feeling. 
Definitely has some bugs to work out, so it may be worth waiting for another month before you buy the game, and I am never a fan of Battle pass systems in my paid for games, but the game stands on it's own without any paid for cosmetics. 
The majority of my time has been solo play, so I can say I have enjoyed the game solo, but it does go to another level if you have a group to play with. 

I can recommend the game as is, even with the few bugs that it has. One of favorite games to come out in 2025 so far.

Title: Needs improvement before it deserves this price tag

I just bought the game, but right after I tried to customize my character, the game crashed and I lost all the saved progress. It was a frustrating experience for a first impression.

In terms of gameplay, I played five matches and barely touched the ball in any of them. As a new player, this clearly shows that the matchmaking system is flawed and not beginner-friendly.

While the game is relatively lightweight in terms of file size, it still lacks optimization. The ball's movement and visual synchronization feel off, and even when playing on an Asia-based server, I experienced noticeable lag — despite having a decent gaming setup.

To make matters worse, playing this game gave me a headache, made me dizzy, and even raised my blood pressure. It’s not just unoptimized — it’s physically uncomfortable to play.

At its current price, the game feels overpriced. For the same amount, buying CS2 Prime offers far more value and content. Rematch, on the other hand, doesn't have engaging events, unique features, or anything truly compelling besides the core football gameplay. Even cosmetic items like outfits don't seem meaningful in the context of this sport.

I’ve already requested a refund. If the developers improve performance and adjust the price, I might consider buying it again during a future discount.

In its current state, this game is more like an alpha than a finished product. While the core idea is interesting, it's far from ready as it is
The only thing that seems feature-complete is the monetization system, with an unreasonably high price tag given the lack of content, planned battle passes, premium currency, rotating store items to create FOMO etc.
Meanwhile, this "ONLINE COMPETITIVE GAME" is still missing: 
-A tutorial (a lot of the basic moveset and interactions can't be tested in the existing practice modes, which are incredibly barebones).
-Bots (meaning that if a player quits, you are automatically stuffed yet still need to suffer for 4:30 mins playing defense)
-Singleplayer game modes to practice in, even for something as basic as goalkeeping or passing. All you have is a couple of "challenges" that are heavily scripted, but allow no freedom or customization
-A report system (so players can score against their own team, troll the game and quit, with seemingly no consequences)
-Indiividual mute system, so if a single person is chewing pop corn you have to either bear it or mute the whole team at once

Technically, it still feels very janky in terms of ball control. It's never really clear who's currently in possession, and trying to turn around with the balll will often leave you running opposite it while it keeps going.
Plus, there are crashes during matches.

EDIT: Ranked multiplayer is worthless since players get disconnected almost every game. it's a 50/50 chance of easy win or impossible odds since almost every game a team is missing a player for minutes at a time.

As much as I love the game and what it offers it does not allow for any meaningful use of its mechanics in an online setting which it the games primary medium of play. The game has a parodically poor online system that is supposed to let players enjoy football online together but this seems to purely facilitate animations and cosmetic expressions and not the games core mechanics as previously mentioned. I can explain:

The game has a catastrophic issue with de-sync and lag in its online. So far since launch there have already been two patches which seemed to attempt to tackle this with no change. Have a peek at the games discussions board for more info on this.

One core issue is Ball de-sync. The ball will not actually be where it appears on your own screen during game play. If you attempt to interact with it you will achieve no impact on the game. This is primarily an 
issue when attempting to push or tackle the ball. The game teaches that if there is a blue signal around the ball then you can press either A/X to push or recieve it or the X/⬜ button to do a pass kick.
This simply does not work at all in most online games and results in no action being taken by the player. The same issue occurs most of the time when passing. You can tell when the ball is de-synced as 
when a goalie catches it after being shot you will still see the ball hit the back of the net then "rubber band" back into their hands.

Possibly the most serious issue however is that the ball will not be able to interact with your player character AT ALL. Occasionally when running with the ball in possession it will simply stop dead in its tracks
with no momentum as if you simply ceased to exist. You see this happen to other players all the time too. This is incredibly frustrating, as you can imagine, when playing goalie. The worst case scenario however is that, at the start of a round after a goal is scored, there is a little "cut scene" where the midfielder will kick the ball back to the player behind them. The ball is supposed to land in their feet as part of this
scripted event but will simply float right through them. When playing 3v3 the person the ball is kicked to is the goalie so, you guessed it, you simply concede a goal to the enemy team before the scene even ends and you don't even get control of your character.

The disconnects are also very bad. Matchmaking seems to be a problem for this game. The time it takes to find a game is often several minutes. This would lead me to believe the game is having to source players from other servers other than the one I selected. I have never had a game with anyone from my Europe server. I have played exclusively with  Russians, Chinese players, and North Americans. This means you have upwards of 130 pings every game which only serves to compound all the previous issues but leads to lots of disconnects.  Players are always getting dropped from games.

It is a real shame because as I said at the start the mechanics are great and feel very fun in the offline workshops; in the tutorial and prologue. They simply don't function as intended however in the main game.
Since I mentioned the tutorial it is worth mentioning that it also does not teach a bunch of the mechanics in the game like dives or soft passes. It also kind of just lets you coast through like a QTE. It asks you to press something and you just do it with no thought of execution or timing or effect. But again at least they work and feel tight. 

Serious consideration need to be given to the game as a service and expeditiously before people simply leave because that would be a crying shame. These online team based sports games are few and far between and there is definitely an audience for them...assuming you can accommodate them.

《开球！Rematch》是一款多人在线足球游戏。游戏中玩家将控制队伍中的一名球员，沉浸式体验第三人称的视角，与其他球员进行激烈、快节奏的多人对抗。

游戏的美术采用了比较简洁的画风，并没有过多的追求人物脸部等细节，相反采用的是近似low poly的建模方式，在保留球衣、球鞋、发型等人物特征点的同时对其他细节进行了优化，达到了一种既简约又特征鲜明的效果。如果玩过该开发者制作的《师父SIFU》的话，应该会发现两款游戏的美术风格是很相近的，笔者个人是比较喜欢这种画风的。

游戏的主题是足球，而在序幕章节，开发者制作了一系列的过场剧情，展示了主角如何从一名业余球员，到被球探选中参与了职业比赛，并且经过自己不断的努力，从青涩弱小逐步成长为能够驰骋球场的球员的过程，感觉像是在看人物的传记片一样，播片虽然不长，但是细节很足，喜欢足球的孩子哪个没有做过类似的梦呢？

与Fifa、实况等操控整只球队玩法不同，本作里玩家只能操控一名角色，其他队友也都是联机的网友而没有AI，玩家可以专注于自己操控的角色，并且让角色做出各种华丽的动作。游戏的操控大部分都是比较简单的，支持手柄和键鼠两种操作方式，以键鼠为例，控球、人球分过、挑球、铲球等都是单键操作的，不需要玩家进行复杂的组合技能，因此比较容易上手。但是游戏里也有很莫名其妙的组合键，比如搓香蕉球需要键盘加鼠标，但是移动鼠标的时候不会给你明确的轨迹指示，所以非常难做到位，相信很多人和笔者一样在教程关的时候就被那个类似的挑射给恶心过。好在除此之外的操作都比较简单。

游戏采用的是赛季+内购的玩法，有赛季通行证，完成比赛可以获得经验来解锁通行证内奖励，同时也有商城，通行证和商城给的都是球衣、球鞋外形涂装和球场灯光等装饰类型的东西，对比赛和人物属性是没有任何影响的。

游戏对局采用的是室内足球的模式，有3V3、4V4和5V5这三种模式。室内足球的规则相比11人足球来还是有不少区别的，比如球碰到边线会弹回来没有出界一说，再比如门将不是固定的等，铲球也不会导致对方受伤，相比来说自由度要高很多，而专注操控一名角色也能明显体现出高手玩家和普通玩家之间的差距。游戏的玩法还是非常有趣的。

然后最重要的来了，游戏需要全程联网加多人对战，然而目前国内玩的人实在是不多，特别笔者由于时间关系只能白天玩，基本上是排不到人的。如果想要玩的话只能选择外服，然而外服的人似乎也不是很多，目前来看玩家较多的是欧服，但是延迟问题比较严重，而且不同区服之间也是有时差存在的，所以导致目前想要秒排爽玩一天是比较困难的，只能寄希望于玩的人多一些、网络能够顺畅一些。

总的来说，《开球！REMATCH》有着简约明快的美术风格，游戏中玩家专注操控一名角色体验多人室内足球，玩法简单有趣，奖励内容也比较丰富，游戏质量是不错的。但是多人联机想要快速匹配到玩家不容易，希望以后能够得到改善。

Pros
- Great and fun gameplay loop over and over
- The graphics is good
- They nailed the art style
- Satisfying animation when shooting or passing
- Those people who don't enjoy football will probably enjoy this
- The developer is fast when responding to the fans to fix and improve the game
- To be MVP is not always the player who scores a lot, but the player who always involves the game like intercept, passing and save.
- The music rhythm is great
- The maps is unique and fantastic

Cons
- The servers and matchmaking is too long at launch, now they kinda fixed it so great job sloclap. But still netcode is the problem
- Bugs happened to me like sometimes the player can't even touch the ball/dribble
- The ball goes through GK lmao, even though the animation kept the ball
- Players who likes dribble the whole field with (ronaldinho/bachira) skin, didn't pass the ball and lose it. They are one of the most annoying thing in the game
- Players that who don't want to defend but stay at the front and keep spamming R3 or saying pass
- Micro transaction at launch is a bit much, they should've do it after a season or two. Because we bought the game and the cosmetics are less than i thought.

Overall 8.5/10

[h3] 100% Achievement Review: A quick review based on my experience completing all the (available) achievements. [/h3]

[u] [url=https://store.steampowered.com/curator/45897386/] Feel free to follow my curator for more 100% reviews! [/url] [/u]

Title: REMATCH

Summary: PvP soccer game 

Personal notes: Rematch is a competitive & fast paced soccer game. You play on teams of 3,4 or 5 in an enclosed arena fighting against other teams for victory. There is a practice mode but this game is primarily online PvP. I will say this game at it's best is a blast and a very welcome change in the sports genre, especially with friends. The character creation and customisation is cool along with great anime style visual and sound design. The moves as well have great animations and feel very rewarding when played correctly. I have not pre-ordered a game In quite some time but I am honestly glad I did with this one. Personally, REMATCH is a great change from the dull sports genre that I have grown kind of tired with, not to mention being a Blue Lock fan so this is a great replacement for me. With all this being said, this game has things that It will need to improve upon to retain it's player base. I am not going to go in depth about the player base itself but I will say it also plays a role in user enjoyment. It is a team game people, PASS the ball. I will talk about the handful of glitches and bugs that were present in the Beta and are still a problem now. A few that I can list of the top of my head are being forcefully disconnected after a goal, the ball will sometimes get "stuck" or a player will not be able to interact with the ball until they reset. Not to mention just overall server stability as it is vital for a competitive game like this. I am also a little disappointed in the lack of certain things. Such as a push to talk option instead of open mic or nothing or basically any information surrounding the ranked system (Please Sloclap). This also ranges to stuff like the UI, why cant I see my friends level or stats, which builds into my next point. I would also like an option to create a club. Its a team game we should be able to make a club and represent it. Achievement wise this game isn't too crazy, most of the achievements are quite simple with the others only taking time or a specific thing. I listed the ones I had the most difficulty with below. Since the pre-order release date I have been grinding this game and I honestly believe this game has the potential to be a Mastapiece (10/10) but as it stands right now It does not. Overall this game feels like it could have been released as an early access game. It still has quite a bit to work on but I do think it has a very, very solid base to build off of. I have high hopes for the future of REMATCH, and I believe Sloclap will continue to improve this fun and unique soccer game.  

Time it took to complete: 33hrs

Most difficult achievement(s):
- Expert (Reach level 30.)
- Ultra Trail (Run 170 km.)
- Golden gloves/boots/Maestro (Perform 100 saves/100 goals & 100 assists.)
- Making History (The beginning of an amazing career.)

Difficulty rating: 
★★★★★☆☆☆☆☆ 5/10

Overall rating: 
★★★★★★★★☆☆ 8/10

Начнем с того, что играл еще на бете, благо дали доступ ознакомится, не скажу что прям зацепила, но я как не фанат футбола иногда заходил и бегал не без удовольствия. Вот и состоялся полноценный релиз, что можно сказал, игра удалась и заслужила на данный момент свою долю хайпа и внимания, потому как увлекает моментально в виду ее на первый взгляд казуальности, но это лишь обманный первоначальный эффект, потому как немного поиграв и «поломав» пальцы вы сможете более менее контролировать мяч или успешно его забрать у игрока, первоначально это сделать будет очень трудно, но с опытом вы адаптируетесь и сможете весьма неплохо так финтить и забивать голы. Насчет, плохо работающий серверов и вылетов все решилось с помощью платного ВПН, тогда ни с одного матча не вылетел, был небольшой пинг иногда в матчах, но не критично и играть можно вполне комфортно, мне помогло и может вам тоже, пишут что проблема касается не только РФ, но и всего мира, там тоже постоянные вылеты без ВПН наблюдаются, насколько правда или нет не могу утверждать. По итогу что могу сказать, я как не любитель футбола от слова совсем заценил и не пожалел о покупке, понятно что мастером который в одиночку обходит все поле я вряд ли стану, но как минимум играть уверенно в рамках среднего игрока планирую точно, тем более без задротства можно вполне спокойно научится. Плюс еще один данной игры и это цена, она вполне доступная для среднего игрока, значит онлайн будет и проект будет жить и развиваться. 

Моя оценка: 8/10.

Let me preface this by saying that i love this game, but i can't recommend it right now for many reasons that i think really needs to be addressed before i can say this game is worth getting. In it's current state the game feels unfinished. The devs have made an effort to fix match making but that's the least of its worries. The biggest issues i've experienced so far is the game crashing way more while playing solo ranked than partied up with friends but on top of that, the desync issue is a glaring one for sure. There have been many matches where i'll not only feel my controller rumble when stealing the ball or taking possession but the ball will rubberband right back to the opposing players foot like nothing happened and it's not just playing on offense or defense but even as keeper there have been many times where it'll show a player catching the ball in a replay but somehow the enemy team scored. As it stands now, i can't recommend it, especially for solo players. Once these issues have been addressed and fixed then i can say the game is worth the price

Genel puanım 7/10.
Bugfixler, cross-platform, lag problemlerinin giderilmesi, oyun içi sohbet sisteminin düzeltilmesi, ceza ve takdir sistemi, oyuncu raporlama, takım arkadaşını atma oylaması, dereceli için lp sistemine ayarlamalar, yeni dereceli seçenekleri, yeni oyun modları ve daha fazla kozmetik gelirse ki üstte bahsettiğim her şeyin ileride geleceğinden eminim, bu puan çok rahat 9 olur.

Her oyunun altında olan o detaylı uzun incelemeye gelecek olursak da: Erken erişim ve elite edition ile gelen fazladan üç günlük süreyle birlikte toplam 20 saati devirdim. İlk günler olan buglar sebebiyle oyuna derecelide gümüş 1 başlayıp en az iki maçta bir oyuna gelen troller ya da oyun başladıktan sonra çıkan takım arkadaşları yüzünden 10k skor da yapsam, lobideki en yüksek skoru da elde etsem bir türlü devamlılık sağlayamadım ve her mağlubiyette skorun nolursa olsun, kendi kalesine gol atan takım arkadaşlarından eksik oynamamıza kadar hiçbir şey aldığımız ya da kaybettiğimiz lp'yi değiştirmediği için ve dereceniz yükseldikçe daha çok lp kaybediyor olduğunuzdan dolayı oyuna muazzam bir vakit harcamanız gerekiyor. Oyunuma 3 maç art arda gelen aynı troll yüzünden gold 3 80 lp'den 26 lp'ye düştüm. Hem mikrofon açıp rastgele hakaretler ediyorlar, hem de kendi kalelerine atıyorlar. Bunun bir yaptırımı olmalı. Yine, hem oyuncuları engelleyemiyoruz, hem de rapor edemiyoruz, bu da haliyle oyundan soğutuyor. Oyunun çıkışı üzerinden pek geçmediği için ping problemleri, ki ben aşırı yaşamadım ama çok yaşayan var, buglar hakkında ya da cross-play hakkında konuşmak yersiz. Cross-play için yapımcılar buglara sebebiyet verdiğinden dolayı askıya aldıklarını ve en büyük öncelikleri olduğunu duyurdular zaten. Genel oynanış olarak alışması uzun sürmüyor ama ustalaşması zaman alabilir. Yapımcı ekip ayrıca özellikle düz, bizim gibi oyunculardan aldıkları dönütlere dikkat edip oyundaki eksikleri günden güne tamamlayacaklarını belirttiler. Her online oyunda olan o salyalı kitle burada biraz daha fazla var, arkadaşlarınızla oynamayacaksanız en azından raporlama, engelleme yahut oylayarak odadan atma gibi özellikler gelmeden rekabetçi tarafına bulaşmanızı önermiyorum. Belki ben çözememişimdir ama en büyük eksisi de oyun içi konuşma olayı. Sesli sohbettekileri susturamıyorsunuz ve bu sürekli takır tukur klavye sesleri eşliğinde birilerinin çay şapurdatıp çekirdek yemesi akabinde evlerinin içindeki kavgaları dinlemenize yol açıyor, bir, gol atmadan da kapatıp açamıyorsunuz mikrofonunuzu. Ek olarak oyunun fiyatı da aman aman değil, bundan sonraki hayatınızda iki defa iskender yemezseniz sonsuza kadar sahip olabilirsiniz.

В игре реагет хуевоо. Даже в пж зарегай 2 (кс 2) лучше регает нежели в этой помойке. Концепция интересная, игра интересная, но над механикой надо все еще работать и работать, как и над регистрацией. Механика немного тупая, ибо есть частые задержки в движениях. Ударил - 1 секунду не можешь двигатся. Ударили тебе по ноге, когда выбивали мяч, но по мячу не попали - 1 секунду не можешь двигатся (ВТФ??). Зачастую когда даешь пас, и при этом не двигаешь мышкой (ну или немного дернул мышкой при развороте) пас даётся в ПИЗДДУ. Просто улетает не туда, куда ты целился, часто также летит назад, к тебе в ворота. Я вообще советую разрабам не то чтобы убрать эту функцию, а просто добавить ползунок выключение этой хуййни. В плане, куда прицелился прицелом, а не мышкой, туда пускай и летит мяч БЛЯТЬЬ. Некоторые движения не мягкие, и часто трудно управлять персонажем нормально. Ощущается некая задержка в движениях. Словно у тебя нет норм сцепления с травой.У меня пинг 40-70, но ПОСТОЯННО не регает движения, и удары. Иногда ты делаешь рывок на кнопку E, ты видишь удар, ты слышишь звук, на доли секунды ты видишь, как ты уже выбил мяч с ног противника, но через доли секунд он опять у противника в ногах, ты просто проскользил по земле, при этом потерял свое драгоценное время, и дал противнику забить. Но если говорить по факту, это не ТЫ допустил ошибку, а просто сервер НАХХУЙ решил не РЕГАТЬ твой подкат по мячу. Часто мяч летит лагано. Был удар по воротам от меня, в правый верхний угол, мяч оказался в воротах, а пытающийся засейвить противник, не успел прыгнуть вовремя. Итог - был гол. Да? ДА НИХХУЯ. На самом деле гола блятьь нет.... После того, как тебе показали, как мяч УЖЕ ЗАЛЕТЕЛ в ворота противника, и противник прыгнул ООЧЕНЬ поздно, мяч магией телепортируется вратарю в руки... Гола нет, а ты, дружочёк, ИДИ НАХХУЙ. Честно, я будь-то бы играю в недоделаную бетку, а не полностью релизнувшую игру. Пиздееецц.

Игра мне нравится, но из-за механики, из-за лагов самого мяча, и из-за нерегистрации моих подкатов (E) и скилов (C, X, F), играть попросту трудно и очень нервно затратно.

A ver. Por donde empiezo. Recomiendo el juego?
Respuesta corta: Sí (mirar actualización más abajo)
Respuesta larga: Depende, si te gusta el fútbol y estas buscando algo que no se parezca al fifa o similares, donde se premia la visión de juego y el juego en equipo, adelante. 
Sé que se han puesto de moda los vídeos cortos de gente haciendo goles súper enrevesados, pero eso es uno entre mil. Aquí se viene a jugar con fundamentos, si eres un chupón te vas a comer más patadas que la propia pelota. 

Dejado eso claro, vamos con los pros y contras del juego actualmente a dií 22/06/2025

Pros:
 
-Jugabilidad: Jugarlo es divertido, es de esos juegos en los que cuando comienzas a entender como funciona y lo empiezas a dominar, sientes una grata satisfacción.
-Estética: El juego es bonito, sigue con la el estilo de los otros juegos del estudio. Una especie de estilo cartoon muy característico que han ido puliendo desde Absolver y pasando por Sifu. Tiene un rollo desenfadado pero dejando espacio para la expresión de cada jugador. La edición de personaje es bastante completa ya que te deja editar muchas cosas de tu avatar. 
Los escenarios, pese a ser un campo de fútbol con paredes holográficas y fondos muy bonitos, siento que combinan muy bien con el theme del juego. A parte de que parece que tiene un lore detrás y todo que nos dejan ver en el tutorial nada más abrimos el juego.
-Monetización: Todo lo que está en la tienda es íntegramente estético, no hay nada pay to win. Todo lo que hay de momento, quitando el pak de Ronaldinho, se puede comprar con moneda del juego que se consigue subiendo de nivel y en el pase gratuito de batalla. Pero como ya he dicho no va a afectar a tu gameplay porque es todo estético.

Contras:

Jugabilidad: Es verdad que esta es dibertida y se siente bien cuando la dominas, pero de momento hay mucho desync y los picos de lag por lo sobrecargado que está el server (al menos eso creo) afectan negativamente a la experiencia de juego. Te teletrasnportas tú, el balón, los contrarios. El balón te atraviesa y te meten gol siendo portero (me ha pasado), Conectas un robo de un centro y al segundo la pelota desaparece de tus pies y la tiene el contrario ya en dirección a tu portería mientras tu corrías a la suya sin la posesión, etc. En general si arreglan estos problemas el juego sería mucho más disfrutable. Las mecánicas es cierto que son extrañas, sobretodo para los que vengan del fifa o similares, el avatar no va a ir a por los centros automáticamente ni se va a adelantar a los pases al hueco, aquí tú tienes que hacer esas lecturas de juego y anticiparte (Esto no es malo pero requiere un periodo de adaptación para acostumbrarse a que tu avatar no tiene un imán en la bota, aun que a veces el del rival si parezca tenerlo).

Estética: De momento la variedad de peinados, accesorios y demás es bastante limitada, es verdad que el juego acaba de salir, pero teniendo en cuenta que vas a ver a tu personaje durante tantas horas ya que esto va a ser un juego como servicio, que menos que poder disponer de unas cuantas cosas más.
A parte hay un error con los accesorios del avatar y es que por alguna razón, las calzas y botas que pintes van a salir reflejando una especie de color marrón y verde un poco feo en lugar de ser del que tú las coloreaste. 

Monetización: Si bien es verdad que todo lo que hay de pago es estético, la cantidad de cosas que están detrás del muro de pago del pase de batalla es bastante grande. Desde celebraciones, hasta nuevos cortes de pelo, barbas, ropa, etc, que solo vas a poder conseguir pasando por caja. Yo no soy fan de los pases de batalla. Y este no es una excepción, porque una cosa es poner un par de cosas, pero hay 3 pases de batalla distintos que transcurren a la vez. Así que si te interesa prepara la cartera para pagar el equivalente a una copia nueva del juego mas 5 lereles cada season.

En general le veo potencial, pero yo eliminaría la exclusividad de los objetos del pase de batalla premium. Así los jugadores que ya han pagado por el juego y no quieran invertir en micropagos que encima tienes que farmear, también tengan acceso a estos. Pueden dejar si quieren una opción para desbloquearlo todo de golpe pagando, así la gente que quiera un cosmético o no tenga tiempo de jugar como un enfermo porque tiene que trabajar también tengan acceso a todo.

Actualizado día: 25/06/2025

El juego es una maravilla, la jugabilidad es divertida y los partidos rápidos y entretenidos, pero tiene muchos fallos:
- Constantes crasheos con el mensaje de Unreal Engine, no se si será culpa del motor o no.
- No se pueden jugar revanchas.
- La opción de cancelar el "macthmaking" funciona después del partido, pero no en el menú inicial.
- Es frustrante ver como jugadas muy similares tienen resultados diferentes (a veces el portero coge el balón y en circunstancias idénticas en otras ocasiones no lo hace).
- No tiene opciones para reportar jugadores, ya que es un juego en el que es fácil trollear (desde jugadores que se meten en su propia portería, jugadores que no hacen nada en la partido chupando poste, etc.).
- A veces da error cuando entras en una partida empezada y el personaje se queda bloqueado, pero además tampoco te permite abrir el menú ni nada, requiere cerrar el juego directamente desde Inicio o Finalizar Tarea.
- Las opciones de personalización (colores) son algo limitadas en cuanto a mezclas de colores se refiere, no entiendo por qué hay tanta restricción, he jugado partidos en los que los equipos llevaban casi los mismos colores y solo se les distinguía por el nombre en su cabeza.
- Hay un modelado de cara que no está bien hecho, supongo que es algo circunstancial ya que ayer no lo vi.

Por otro lado, cuenta con ventajas:
- El matchmaking es bastante rápido y no es necesario esperar demasiado para jugar (el temporizador se queda pillado cuando lo haces al finalizar los partidos y se va acumulando, llegando a mostrar hasta 50-60 minutos de espera cuando en realidad acabas de salir de un partido.
- El tutorial está bastante bien y te explican todo lo necesario para jugar, no solo los comandos simples.
- El prólogo no se por qué lo meten, si es bastante parecido al tutorial (se viene en el futuro un modo campaña?).
- La tienda cuenta con algunas objetos de personalización que puedes desbloquear comprando, pero no es necesario dinero real, (para la mayoría de cosas, hay un pack de Ronaldinho actualmente 22/06/2025 que es de pago €) ese dinero lo consigues jugando partidos y no son objetos caros... de momento.
- La posibilidad de mutear micro propio y ajenos está muy bien y es fácilmente accesible desde el menú de pausa durante el partido.
- La rueda de diálogo estilo Rocket League está bien pero bastante limitada, al igual que las celebraciones.

Es un juego que recomiendo 100% a pesar de los fallos, que espero arreglen pronto, sobre todo si se juega con amigos.

This would be a fantastic free to play game. For a game with a box price its really not there yet. The controls are not intuitive and the entire experience feels rushed. In what little time I played I can not tell you how many times I've seen guys who should have gained possession run past the ball. How over powered the flip over the head move is currently. How shooting the ball off the back board is more effective than shooting it at the net. I think all versions of the controls are scuffed. You can aim a lot better on keyboard and mouse but the gameplay suffers. You can get a better feeling on controller but the aiming suffers. This game has a fantastic foundation. If they build on this quickly this game will be really good. If they can not capitalise on the launch traffic and take 6+ months to get the game up to snuff this game will die. I really feel, similar to Rocket League, it will eventually go free to play. When you see the in game store its already set up for it. Just wait until it does. For a box price its not worth it. Play it on gamepass until it goes free to play on here.

ReMatch выглядит как простая казуалка про футбол, но первые же матчи показывают - здесь есть и адреналин, и свои особенности. Минималистичная графика и динамичный геймплей создают атмосферу уличной зарубы, где всё решают скорость и реакция. Но есть моменты, которые сбивают с толку...

Что бесит:
❌ Регистрация - ловишь мяч, а через 0.2 секунды он уже в воротах. С моей камеры - явный сейв, но игра считает иначе.
❌ Механика вратаря:
     -Может спокойно ловить мяч ВНУТРИ ворот без последствий!!!
     -Принимает мяч в руки от своих игроков. 
❌ Глючная система пасов - направляешь курсор на игрока, а мяч летит в случайную сторону.
❌ Нет репортов - игроки, забивающие автоголы, остаются безнаказанными. Системы бана или кика нет вообще.

Что хочется в будущем:
✔ Историю матчей (статистику, повторы матчей)
✔ Пенальти
✔ Русскую озвучку 
✔ Легендарную Waka Waka от Шакиры - для атмосферы =)
✔ Фикс правил (особенно с пасами назад вратарю)
✔ Систему репортов

Финал:
Игра могла стать классным бесплатным проектом с донатом за косметику. Но за текущий ценник — переплата. 

Оценка: 6.5/10

Since the closed beta, this game landed [i]instantly[/i] into my top 3 favorite games. Holy hell is this game fun. 

I've been playing SLCP games since the launch of Absolver, and this is hands down their most polished experience I've ever had in their games. Mechanically, it works on both keyboard and controller, and the controls are very easy to get a hang of. 

You have certain buttons to move the ball, modifiers to move the ball differently, an avoid option to get away from tackles, a tackle option, an intercept/dive button, and a really cool minigame for shooting the ball. You can essentially do a [u]murphy shot[/u], which is to curve the ball in such a way that it can completely evade defenders while still hitting it's target. 

There are certain martial art/acrobatic elements to the game as well, as you can shoot the ball straight out of midair with a tornado kick, and the like. This game is a huge recommend, and at a $30 state to get everything except for some cosmetic upgrades with the elite editions, there is absolutely zero reason not to pick this up and give it a try. It might not be for you, but at the very least, grab a few friends and do some pub matches, the moment of brilliance where the teamwork clicks is enough to keep you hungry for more.

the game is an absolute blast to play with friends i will give you that, but so far this is my experience and what i've been through, edited after 50 more hours:

- the meta in this game makes it so boring, like, the round begins, enemy gk sends the ball from post to post to his striker who then jumps 3 meters into the air, kickflips his arse and rotates like a ballerina just to score a pinpoint mach 2 goal while your goalie AND the defenders have basically no way to prevent this from happening, since the shot is supported by insane desync, dogwater networking, server latency issues and also some stupid hidden mechanic that just makes the shot animation have priority, disabling your defenders from doing anything and the ball flying straight through the gk's dive? this happens very often
i massively support the creativity you can have with your team through passing, just makes the goal feel way more worth it and rewarding, shame the devs don't endorse this, instead they put up an achievement for shooting it post to post, that's odd.
- sliding tackles are just so stupid, people spam it all the time, the tutorial makes no effort in teaching you how that ♥♥♥♥ actually works, especially since sometimes an opp just slide tackles my rainbow flicked ball in mid-air. also ignoring the fact that the recovery is way too fast and being able to slide tackle with zero momentum is just wrong (i thought this wasn't rocket league?)
- defending feels.. wrong.. having to put an extra finger to work to hold an extra button just for your fella to actually react to balls coming his way... like i get that it can't just be free interceptions but come on, the stance is super inconsistent and it's not like there's much skill to that (that'd be positioning), since you can't tell - will i actually intercept the ball? will i just deflect it or will my guy get ahold of it? which way will it deflect? will it even deflect or just orbit around me and continue it's original trajectory? cuz ♥♥♥♥ like that happens
- there's a thing people do when they pushball while jogging and then they turn around to sprint and the ball just magnetizes to their feet; this ♥♥♥♥ breaks the game SO BAD, not only does it look weird, the interactions it creates are game breaking: if someone else stepped into the ball while that's happening, it's just gonna go all over the place to this guy, then to that guy, and then the first guy again... sometimes it just breaks the ball completely so that someone's not even able to take it under control, like at all, but then i see something else than my friend, like "where's the ball?" while he literally has it at his feet?
- the game just, costs too much? i mean... if there were no in-game purchases, if the game was polished and finished and working, if there was A RETRY BUTTON FOR THE PRACTICE CHALLENGES LIKE HELLO WHY DO I GOTTA RETURN TO MENU? then sure... but battlepasses belong in f2p games, cosmetic or not
- also cancelling matchmaking just does nothing, i thought we left that in war thunder
- RETRY BUTTON FOR PRACTICE ?
- no reporting for griefer kids
- no all chat to "politely discuss the opponents actions"
- sometimes the game kinda feels like it's making fun of you
- there HAS to be a memory leak or something
- also what the ♥♥♥♥ is wrong with the voice chat? i usually play with friends so i have it disabled, but then suddenly i can hear a teammate... while it's disabled... and they can hear me... while i'm muted? and lowering the voice chat volume does NOTHING, i could still hear people, even when i turned down ALL the volumes in the game

this game NEEDS one more year in development, or make it free. cuz it SUCKS

Look I'm not gonna lie to you I've been waiting for this game to be amde and to come out from early 2000's when "RPG" multiplayer football games died out and I was left with just FIFA. Anyway it's impressive how sloclap have managed to get this from inside my dreams and deliver it to all major consoles some 20 years later. And oh boy how did they deliver!
Let me tell you first that I am not someone who likes online only games. You can vote me least likely to play solo ranked because I prefer to play for fun. If this game had single player I would've been lost to all my family and friends for years! 
So this multiplayer only game has somehow managed to get me out of my shell and have me play a competitive online only game like my life depends on it. I can honestly say I've never felt the same sensation that I feel when I play football irl from a video game before Rematch. This game captures the feeling perfectly. I can't put it into words but it's like I'm on the pitch doing everything myself. The game is incredible!
If you love football you need to play it! If you love playing sports for the thrill and competitiveness - you have to play this game! If you like competitive team games where your skill matters - you must play this game! If you like playing something that has you make split-second decisions that matter - you must play this game! If you like a challenge and want to develop your skills so you can be the best in a game - you must play this game! You get what I'm saying. I guess if you're against sports games, tension, skill-based gameplay, competitive online game then perhaps this is not the game for you but...I think you should still try it.
IF you're on the fence, get the game! If you're weary of in-game purchases, season pass etc - it's all cosmetic anddoesn't affect your game whatsoever. As it stands seasons are timed so I guess that's a negative but they can change that.
Let mu just put it like that - The servers sometimes have issues, sometimes you'll say "this is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥", sometimes you won't understand what happened but even then you'll be enjoying yourself. Trust me you must accept that the mistakes are in you and you can play better. THe game responds so well to your inputs and lets you do whatever you want so no, it's not the lag or bug that made you missplay it's YOU. And if that gets that fire inside you going so you want to better yourself...you'll be right at home!
Are you still reading this? Why? Go buy the game and see you in the glass box! 
Ohh and don't forget... PASS!!! Cross it! Over here! Good job! We got this!
It's like rocket league without the cars

The concept is great. I feel like it's inspired heavily by Rocket League. There is a lot of potential, the game looks unfinished, but completely functional. I have no problem with connection at all like many unlucky people, it just feels empty of soul. It lacks that feeling of reward. The animations lack fluidity. The atmospheric sounds are minimal, really basic and the game is filled with cheap FX sounds. It needs more dedication and investment from the developers to turn it into a solid product.

The first beta test was great, gameplay was smooth with few glitches but had potential and I quickly preorder after that. Then the last test came and it was like a different game with bugs, glitches and so many lag issues. Now the game came out and it still has the same issues, in the first test I loved playing goalkeeper but recently I hate it, the ball warps around, saving balls is not consistent and it seems gks keep getting nerfed with animations and limits. It has monetization like a f2p game, all cosmetic thankfully, but I feel duped paying for an elite edition to support the devs and then releasing Ronaldinho as dlc.
At $20 or f2p it would be worth it just like Rocket League, but right now at $30 its not even half a $60 game. They need to fix the lag, the crashes and gks, crossplay plus some form of single player matches and ranked for 3v3, and make ranked more rewarding. And I bought this both on pc and ps5 because I felt it has potential but please don't waste it.

rematch, el único juego que estoy en un servidor de sudamericana hosteado en algún punto de la era jurasica, me va el ping como si en vez de conectandome a un servidor de brasil estuviera intentando encontrar vida extraterrestre. Me toca con uno de cataluña, que parecia el fan más aferrimo de illojuan desde el 2016; un brasileño, que estaba a punto de realizar un hechizo budú para invocar el aura de pelé y jugar como nunca y un tipo que tenia el microfono pegado a la nariz donde por cada respiración podia sentir hasta las conexiones más inconexas de su lóbulo frontal. El de cataluya antes de empezar suelta un "Vai' a ve' el mejo' delantero e su puta vida sae" seguido de un "ILLO E' COÑA QUE SOY PORTERO?" bajando yo y volviendome el mayor portero de la historia que ni los fans de ochoa me iban a decir malo, para terminar perdiendo 4-0 pero consiguiendo 3 nuevos admiradores de 3 regiones univerales pues de alguna u otra forma consegui más de 10k de puntos de solo atrapar y robar.

Es por eso que recomiendo este juego, no hay el mejor ping, no hay los mejores compañeros (Y siempre los buenos son en contra) pero te saca risas. Te da momentos en los que eres el mejor rematador de la nueva era y otras donde dudas si has usado tus manos desde que naciste por que no entiendes que estás haciendo, compren rematch, es y será, una experiencia.

As someone who played the beta, enjoyed the game and pre-ordered the Elite edition, I love the game. Which is why it hurts to say this. It honestly sucks so much to play right now. This game is so technical and 50\50's are so important, yet with 80 ping you will just lose them no matter what. Caught the ball as a keeper? Well actually you didn't and it moved through you. You tackled someone and got the ball? Well actually the ball is behind you and they just scored. So many of these pile on top of you in a game that it's just unplayable (I assume with low ping it might not be an issue but 80 shouldn't be this bad).

I just can't recommend this game right now. When the net-code is fixed it's gonna be the best football game on the market. Right now, it's close to unplayable.


Update: People seemed to figure out how to easily cheat in this game so now high ranks (I'm currently diamond 3) are completely unplayable

Godna polecenia gra. Uderzająco podobna do Rocket League,  ale w mojej opinii jest od niej dużo prostsza. Są samouczki i areny treningowe - nie trzeba poświęcić wielu godzin żeby przyswoić sobie podstawy całej mechaniki. Dużym plusem  jest to, że istnieją tylko dwie podstawowe sztuczki techniczne (sombrero i ruletka) więc to powinno ograniczyć graczy, których celem jest popisywanie się i  psuć grę innym graczom. Oczywiście jak w każdej tego typu grze można trafić na graczy egoistycznych, którzy nie podają piłki i nie potrafią grać zespołowo. Zdarza się to nagminnie  w szybkich meczach, których nie polecam grać jak już się przebije 8 level. Wtedy odblokowują się rankedy, gdzie od razu już czuć inne podejście do rozgrywki. Z minusów jakie do tej pory zauważyłem to:

- serwery niestety kuleją (bardzo często się zdarza, że trafia się na serwer powyżej 80  pingu, piłka potrafi wtedy się gliczować i dziwnie zachowywać) 
- rankedy są tylko w formacie 5vs5 (przydałyby się też rankedy 4vs4 oraz 3vs3)
- próg wykrywania mikrofonu w grze praktycznie nie istnieje (słychać wszystko co się dzieje u kolegów z drużyny: kaszle, charczenie, szumy). Zdecydowanie do poprawy zwiększenie progu wykrywania
- podania czasami potrafią lecieć w losowym kierunku (tutaj kwestia wprawy, gra jest bardzo czuła na nawet najmniejszy ruch myszką) ale w tak dynamicznej grze jak ta może czasami dojść do wylewu 

+ wszyscy są tutaj równi, nie ma modelu P2W więc mam nadzieję, że twórcy z tego nie zrezygnują w przyszłości
+ dynamiczna rozgrywka
+ idealna propozycja dla graczy ceniących sobie grę zespołową i przede wszystkim dobrą zabawę
+ nie ma stałych przypisanych pozycji, dowolna wymienność i rola lotnego bramkarza 
+ przyjemna imersja z widoku trzeciej osoby, czuć że strzały, które oddajemy mają moc
+ akrobatyczne, widowiskowe woleje
+ możliwość podkręcania piłek zarówno w podaniach jak i w strzałach 
+ audio przyjemne dla ucha

Don't pay attention to the bad reviews, the game is great. It does have a learning curve and you might encounter the occasional idiot that hasn't played soccer in their life so they won't make a pass. But looking beyond that lies a game that can genuinely dethrone the monopoly of EA's FC bull crap.

Microtransactions? Only cosmetic, they have no weight on your way to play the game, its not a pay-to-win as some people might be saying it is.

Update: The game has fallen off hard. The number of exploits grows larger with every update they release. The amount of microtransactions compared to the amount of content is insane. The queue times are insanely high, the game price is stupid for such a half baked game, the competitive scene is a bunch of exploit abusers that only know how to play the game by actively using everything that is broken and can't be defended against.

I loved this game and gave it a chance, but its clear that Sloclap is focused on making a profit rather than fixing the game.

Fun fact, they hosted a discord contest for best goal clip. The one that won the contest was a clip of a player that abused the "tech" mechanics and scored a solo goal. Mind you, they sell this as a team game, not a "let me solo the other team" game. Hypocritical at its finest and all for the price of 40 dollars.

[h1] O jogo de futebol que eu sempre quis! [/h1]
 
[h2] Prós [/h2]

O jogo é muito divertido, coordenar jogadas com seus colegas de equipe é muito satisfatório (quando funciona)

Driblar, passar e chutar é bem responsivo, vai depender só da sua mira

jogar no gol consegue ser divertido, mas tem que ficar esperto e saber reagir e ler o oponente direito

jogar com pessoas aleatórias tende a ser complicado, mas o jogo tem um chat de voz que permite a você pelo menos tentar se coordenar 

[h2] Contras [/h2]

infelizmente o jogo ainda tem alguns problemas de conexão, as vezes o jogo meia que se dessincroniza da uma lagada, bolas que deviam ter sido defendidas passam e outras que eram pra passar não passam etc...  

O jogo tem um passe de batalha carinho mesmo o próprio jogo sendo pago(e não achei barato), o que é meio triste sinceramente.

[h1] Rematch: onde o VAR dorme, mas a diversão acorda! [/h1]

Já pensou num jogo de futebol em que tudo pode acontecer e geralmente acontece? Rematch é isso.
Chute de trivela que parece mágica, carrinho que mais parece luta livre e juiz... bom, se ele apareceu, ninguém viu.

Aqui não tem realismo forçado, nem gráfico de ponta. Mas tem carisma, partidas imprevisíveis e aquele caos bom que lembra a pelada de domingo com os amigos.

Rematch não quer ser FIFA, nem PES. Ele é o jogo onde o gol contra é memorável, e o botão de "jogar de novo" é quase automático.

[b]Destaques:[/b]

-Carrinhos exagerados (às vezes até demais);

-Goleiros que vivem entre o milagre e a tragédia;

-Física que esqueceu o Newton em casa;

-Multiplayer leve, divertido e perfeito pra dar risada.

No fim, Rematch é uma homenagem ao futebol improvisado, cheio de falhas, acertos e histórias boas.
Você não joga só pra vencer — você joga pra se divertir.

E quando acaba…
Pede mais uma.

[b] Prepare as bolinhas de bacon, seus salgadinhos ou chips favoritos, água com gás ou refrigerante de cola... porque quando o juiz apita em Rematch, o caos começa e ninguém sai ileso! [/b]

[b]Nota: 11/10 – Cartão vermelho pro tédio.[/b]


[b]Seleção em construção[/b]

🛠️ Jefson “Jéfão” – O Lateral em Obras (Literalmente)
Já virou lenda urbana: a estreia do Jéfão segue adiada por causa da obra eterna na casa dele. Aparentemente, tão construindo o novo Mineirão lá. Mas quando ele joga, é aquele lateral clássico: firme, confiante, joga sério.
Sempre chega no Discord soltando um de seus bordões tipo:
“Eu sou seu campeão”
“Bolinha de bacon com maionese pra quem tá duvidando!”
“Eu aqui!”
Jéfão entra pouco, mas quando entra... é presença. Ninguém esquece.
________________________________________
🎮 LuckFND – O Goleiro do Beta
Tá difícil defender ele (no campo e fora dele). Prometeu que vai ser o goleiro fixo no beta, mas não sabe nem onde tá o botão de pulo no controle ainda. Tá aprendendo ainda, e todo mundo torce pra ele parar de usar “controle bugado” como desculpa.
Mas o Jéfão acredita e já mandou:
“O goleiro é doido, mas pode ficar tranquilo.”
Então a gente acredita também (por enquanto).
________________________________________
🛡️ Gueré Pelé – O Multi-Função Invisível
Se o time precisa de alguém que joga em todas, é o Gueré. O cara é tipo GPS com perna: aparece na lateral, surge no meio, ajuda no ataque e ainda volta pra defender.
Silencioso, eficiente e consistente. Faz tudo certinho e nem se gaba.
“Criou a lenda da lateral, Jefson 3 pulmões.”
________________________________________
🧔 Morillao Bigode – O Camisa 9 da Responsa
Nosso maior goleador até agora. Quando o time desanda, ele volta pra ajudar, arruma o meio de campo, e no ataque é aquele que pega a bola e resolve (como todo bom jogador, tem aquela fase do hiato de gols).
Gosta de variar, aparece em tudo que é canto, e mesmo assim ainda ajuda na marcação quando a coisa aperta.
Quando tá inspirado, solta aquela:
“Meu Deuuuus Lukinhas!”
________________________________________
🌀 RedBull – O Habilidoso Misterioso
Dribles de salão, embaixadinhas absurdas e gols bonitos. Mas... só quando não tem live do Alemão. Nosso jogador mais ausente dentro de campo, até o momento!
Ninguém sabe como ele consegue jogar tão bem e ao mesmo tempo nunca falar uma palavra no Discord.
Já cogitamos que ele é um IA do Mato Grosso disfarçado.
Mas quando quer, joga muito.
________________________________________
🍼 Chupetista – O Caro Ainda em Observação
Chegou cheio de moral, nome forte, aparência de craque. Mas ainda não mostrou a que veio.
Versátil, tem potencial, mas pouco tempo de campo até agora.
Tem gente dizendo que pode ser o novo Pablo, outros acham que pode surpreender.
Mas já diz o ditado do nosso mestre lateral:
“Cachimbou o cochilo cai.”
________________________________________
🤖 Roboxiliki – A Robótica Aleatória
Topa qualquer posição. Já passou por zaga, ponta, ataque e se deixar até fica de técnico.
Só que... infelizmente, fez parte da dupla menos produtiva da história do time: Patati e Patatá.
Mesmo assim, é jogador de confiança. Aonde precisa, ele tá. O espírito é mais importante que a estatística.
________________________________________
🥔 Purga “Patata” – O Tigrinho Nutella
Tá evoluindo bem. Lembra o atacante Tigrinho (No momento) nas arrancadas, nos dribles meio tortos, e na coragem.
Ainda precisa afinar uns fundamentos, mas tá mostrando fome de bola.
Por enquanto é o Patata da dupla, mas quem sabe não vira o Tigrão do time?
INHaéééérrrrrhhhh (som do tigre)
________________________________________
🛡️ INC – O Zagueiro do Caos
Sim, sou eu mesmo. Aquele que entra pra segurar a zaga, mas às vezes entrega mais do que salva.
Carrinho pro lado errado, desarme que vira assistência pro outro time, e toque rápido que sempre vai pro lugar errado.
Mas quando acerta um lançamento da zaga pro ataque, é bonito de ver.
Na moral? Tô tentando entender ainda como joga defesa nesse jogo, mas tô ali todo dia.
Como diria o Jéfão: “Essa peça que cê queria!”

FIFU aka REMATCH is easily the best soccer game there is. The gameplay is super tight with all around deep mechanics. Playing the goalie is as exciting as playing a striker and I love how you seamlessly switch between both roles. The match length is just right. Making 5v5 the main ranked mode is probably also the best decision, it makes the game a lot more strategic while still being very mechanics based.

Sadly there is still quite a bit of desync with players/the ball and a few very annoying crashes here and there. I just crashed mid ranked game as a Goalie just after catching the ball. The opponents were probably very happy about that freebie lol.

The music is very fitting and I am glad that they went for a more stylized art direction instead of opting into pure realism. The stadium backgrounds are really cool and I love how they switch to your chosen one if you hit a goal, big fan of that.

Overall a very fun and hype game, best in its genre right now.
